scripts.dev: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.local ] && source ./.env.local; set +a; exec "${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}" -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8010 --reload'
scripts.start: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.local ] && source ./.env.local; set +a; exec "${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}" -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8010'
scripts.build: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.local ] && source ./.env.local; set +a; exec "${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}" -m compileall backend scripts/judge_runner.py scripts/test_pickle.py'
scripts.check-types: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.local ] && source ./.env.local; set +a; exec "${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}" -m compileall backend scripts/judge_runner.py scripts/test_pickle.py'
scripts.setup:python: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.local ] && source ./.env.local; set +a; exec "${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}" -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt'
